name: Bitmol
description: Compare BTC/INR rates across Indian exchanges + P2P tools
extendedDescription: Bitmol aggregates BTC/INR rates across Indian exchanges, helping users quickly identify the best prices and custody options. It surfaces pricing spreads and flags whether exchanges support self-custody. For P2P traders, Bitmol includes a premium calculator to easily convert between BTC and INR based on custom spreads.
